title: Implement StickySpaces MVP per tech spec
description: Track implementation of docs/stickyspaces-tech-spec.md delivery plan with dependencies and acceptance gates.
acceptance_criteria: Delivery tasks Phase 0A/0B and Tasks 1-7 are completed with all documented acceptance criteria satisfied.

title: Phase 0A: Risk spike and contract gates
description: Execute pre-build experiments for workspace routing, keystroke routing, latency, launch identity, canvas overlay behavior, and mode decision freeze.
acceptance_criteria: All Phase 0A gates pass 10/10 each (50/50 total) and ADR records selected transition mode plus MVP alignment decisions.

title: Task 7: Hardening and continuous regression gates
description: Add prerequisite diagnostics, stress and chaos suites, protocol/lock behavior checks, lifecycle and local-only guardrails, readability gate, and nightly performance gates.
acceptance_criteria: Hardening suite passes three consecutive runs without flakes and nightly regressions block release candidates.

title: Post-MVP: Resolve multi-display canvas grouping strategy
description: Decide whether post-MVP multi-display uses per-display clusters or a global canvas with display badges; record decision before multi-display implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Decision documented and linked to follow-on implementation issues.

title: Phase 0B: Foundation vertical slice and reliability baseline
description: Build SPM targets, core models/store, IPC protocol/server, yabai query path, baseline CLI commands, capability probe/degraded mode, and initial unit+E2E smoke tests.
acceptance_criteria: stickyspaces new/list/status/verify-sync work on active Space; yabai failure is actionable and non-crashing.

title: Task 1: Editable text and immediate focus
description: Implement editable StickyTextView, guaranteed focus-on-create behavior, and stickyspaces edit/client.edit path with unit and E2E coverage.
acceptance_criteria: New sticky is immediately editable without app activation and edit command updates text deterministically.

title: Task 2: Workspace binding and lifecycle
description: Implement workspace monitor/reconciler, two-phase deletion, atomic create binding guard, visibility fallback strategy, and explicit single-display mode handling with tests.
acceptance_criteria: Rapid switching converges correctly, destroyed-space deletion is confirmed and exactly-once, unsupported mode is structured, and startup warnings are explicit.

title: Task 3: Position and resize
description: Add drag-to-reposition/resize with StickyStore persistence and CLI move/resize/get operations with test coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Position and size round-trip via UI and CLI with under 1pt drift.

title: Task 4: Multiple stickies and dismiss
description: Support multiple stickies per Space, hover dismiss affordance, and dismiss/dismiss-all commands with store/query verification tests.
acceptance_criteria: Create three stickies, dismiss one, and confirm exactly two remain in store plus yabai query.

title: Task 5a: Canvas layout and static rendering
description: Implement canvas layout persistence/engine, static canvas rendering with zoom-pan, active workspace highlighting, and zoom-out/canvas-layout commands.
acceptance_criteria: zoom-out shows all supported Spaces, active highlight is correct, and layout remains deterministic over repeated runs.

title: Task 5b: Canvas interaction
description: Implement sticky-click navigation, region rearrangement persistence, zoom-in path, move-region command, and topology-snapshot-driven rendering with tests.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking sticky reliably navigates to target Space and region arrangement persists across repeated runs.

title: Task 6: Zoom transitions and mode fallback
description: Finalize transition orchestration for selected mode, add forced-mode parity checks, validate panel-canvas alignment, and implement bounded liveness fallback.
acceptance_criteria: Continuity gates pass, transition duration is 300-500ms p95, and parity passes for both modes when dual-mode is enabled.
